parameters.content:
## IA4SDLC - Init Content Status

**Propósito:** Inicializa y mantiene el estado de generación de contenido en `content_generation_status`.

**Modos:**
- `mode=single + program_name` → un programa (llamado desde Ingesta)
- `mode=full` (default) → todos los programas (ejecución independiente)

**Ejemplo de llamada:**
```
POST /webhook/ia4sdlc-init-content-status
{ "mode": "single", "program_name": "CBACT04C" }
{ "mode": "full" }
```

**Tipos de contenido creados por programa:**
technical_doc, functional_doc, quality_audit, use_cases, test_cases

**Tipos sistema:**
system_overview, functional_group_doc, use_cases (system_use_cases)

## Rama: Programa Individual
Llamada desde el workflow de Ingesta
al terminar de procesar un programa.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id           AS program_id,
  p.program_name,
  COALESCE(pv.checksum, '') AS current_checksum
FROM cobol_analysis.programs p
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT checksum
  FROM   cobol_analysis.program_versions
  WHERE  program_id = p.id
  ORDER  BY version_number DESC
  LIMIT  1
) pv ON true
WHERE p.program_name = '{{ $('Extrae Parámetros').first().json.program_name }}'

INSERT INTO cobol_analysis.content_generation_status
  (content_type, scope, program_id, program_name, status)
SELECT
  ct,
  'program',
  {{ $json.program_id }},
  '{{ $json.program_name }}',
  'pending'
FROM unnest(ARRAY[
  'technical_doc',
  'functional_doc',
  'quality_audit',
  'use_cases',
  'test_cases'
]) AS ct
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM cobol_analysis.content_generation_status
  WHERE program_id   = {{ $json.program_id }}
    AND content_type = ct
)

UPDATE cobol_analysis.content_generation_status
SET
  status     = 'stale',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE program_id               = {{ $('Busca Programa').first().json.program_id }}
  AND scope                    = 'program'
  AND status                   = 'completed'
  AND generated_for_checksum IS DISTINCT FROM '{{ $('Busca Programa').first().json.current_checksum }}'

parameters.content:
## Rama: Todos los Programas
Ejecución independiente o programada.
Procesa todos los programas de la BD.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO cobol_analysis.content_generation_status
  (content_type, scope, program_id, program_name, status)
SELECT
  ct.content_type,
  'program',
  p.id,
  p.program_name,
  'pending'
FROM cobol_analysis.programs p
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT unnest(ARRAY[
    'technical_doc',
    'functional_doc',
    'quality_audit',
    'use_cases',
    'test_cases'
  ]) AS content_type
) ct
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM   cobol_analysis.content_generation_status cgs
  WHERE  cgs.program_id    = p.id
    AND  cgs.content_type = ct.content_type
)

UPDATE cobol_analysis.content_generation_status cgs
SET
  status     = 'stale',
  updated_at = NOW()
FROM cobol_analysis.programs p
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT checksum
  FROM   cobol_analysis.program_versions
  WHERE  program_id = p.id
  ORDER  BY version_number DESC
  LIMIT  1
) pv ON true
WHERE cgs.program_id              = p.id
  AND cgs.scope                   = 'program'
  AND cgs.status                  = 'completed'
  AND cgs.generated_for_checksum IS DISTINCT FROM pv.checksum

INSERT INTO cobol_analysis.content_generation_status
  (content_type, scope, resource_key, status)
SELECT
  v.content_type,
  'system',
  v.resource_key,
  'pending'
FROM (
  VALUES
    ('system_overview'::text,  'system_overview'::text),
    ('functional_group_doc',   'functional_group_doc'),
    ('use_cases',              'system_use_cases')
) AS v(content_type, resource_key)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM   cobol_analysis.content_generation_status cgs
  WHERE  cgs.resource_key  = v.resource_key
    AND  cgs.content_type = v.content_type
)

UPDATE cobol_analysis.content_generation_status cgs
SET
  status     = 'stale',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE cgs.scope  = 'system'
  AND cgs.status = 'completed'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM   cobol_analysis.programs p
    WHERE  p.updated_at > cgs.generated_at
  )

SELECT
  scope,
  content_type,
  status,
  COUNT(*)::int AS count
FROM cobol_analysis.content_generation_status
GROUP BY scope, content_type, status
ORDER BY scope, content_type, status
